title: Community Outreach
description: Participate in outreach activities, distributions and community engagement programmes.

title: Programs Associate
description: Support programme planning, coordination and implementation across various initiatives.

title: Education Support
description: Mentor students, support learning activities and assist educational interventions.

title: Widow Empowerment Support
description: Assist empowerment programmes designed to support widows and vulnerable women.

title: Family Support
description: Help coordinate assistance and support services for vulnerable families.

title: Content Creation
description: Develop written, visual and digital content that tells impact stories.

title: Social Media Management
description: Help grow awareness and engagement through social media platforms.

title: Photography & Videography
description: Capture events, outreach activities and inspiring stories of transformation.

title: Media & Communications
description: Support public relations, communications and storytelling efforts.

title: Fundraising
description: Assist campaigns and initiatives that mobilize resources for impact.

title: Partnerships & Sponsorship
description: Help build strategic partnerships and sponsorship opportunities.

title: Administrative Support
description: Provide operational and administrative assistance to the team.

title: Technology Support
description: Contribute technical skills including IT, websites and digital tools.

title: Event Coordination
description: Assist in organizing conferences, trainings and special events.

title: Volunteer Coordination
description: Support volunteer recruitment, onboarding and engagement.

title: Monitoring & Evaluation
description: Help track programme outcomes and measure impact.
